view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for a simple online booking page as evidenced by the linked use case, which describes a booking process where clients can select available time slots, enter payment information, and receive confirmations. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that customers have successfully booked appointments, confirming the functionality of the booking page. The presence of confirmed bookings and the detailed description of the booking process directly support the requirement's coverage.
